meaning: n.二年生植物adj.二年生的,二年一次的
examples: There is also a Biennial Sally Banes Publication Prize in her honor.
The influence of greenhouse environment on the growth of in rudbeckia hirta a biennial herbaceous flower was studied.
The prize is biennial and as such more information will be provided in 2016.
Last August several ships became stuck in mud as they arrived for the biennial event.
